title: H2-Surgical 1.0 per-tick humanoid sensor record
description: Per-hand per-tick sensor record for the 71-DOF Unitree H2-Surgical 1.0 humanoid, extending the 8-arm baseline with per-finger joint and force channels and whole-body balance channels at mixed 100 kHz force plus 10 kHz command rates.

tick.description: 10 microsecond tick index for the 100 kHz force channel; 100 microsecond tick index for the 10 kHz command channel

hand_id.description: left or right hand and its arm

q_arm.description: 7 arm joint angles radians J1 to J7

finger_q.description: 20 finger joint angles radians, 5 fingers x 4 joints

finger_force.description: 5 per-fingertip force magnitudes N at 100 kHz

ee_pos.description: hand reference position x y z mm in patient frame

ee_quat.description: hand orientation quaternion qx qy qz qw

ee_force.description: hand reference force Fx Fy Fz N at 100 kHz

fingertip_pos.description: 5 fingertip positions x y z mm in patient frame

vessel_proximity.description: distance from nearest fingertip or instrument tip to nearest active vessel surface mm at 100 kHz

nir_icg.description: NIR indocyanine green 4 channel intensity at 800 nm

us_b_mode.description: ultrasound 8 element B mode amplitude dB

com.description: whole-body centre of mass x y z m in world frame

zmp.description: zero moment point x y m in floor plane

support_polygon_margin.description: shortest distance from ZMP to support polygon edge mm; must stay at or above the 8 mm floor

ankle_torque.description: left and right ankle pitch torque N.m

hip_torque.description: left and right hip pitch torque N.m

tip_force_scalar.description: per-hand scalar magnitude of fingertip force sum N at 100 kHz

bimanual_cumulative_force.description: sum of both hands tip force magnitudes N at 100 kHz
